inputs.label: Sitting Height (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Sitting height measured in centimeters from the seating surface to the vertex of the head.

businessContext_i18n.en: Sitting height measured in centimeters from the seating surface to the vertex of the head.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Oturma yüzeyinden başın tepe noktasına kadar santimetre cinsinden ölçülen oturma yüksekliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Sitzhöhe in Zentimetern gemessen von der Sitzfläche bis zum Scheitelpunkt des Kopfes.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur assise mesurée en centimètres de la surface d'assise au sommet de la tête.

inputs.label: Sitting Height (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Sitting height measured in millimeters. Will be converted to cm by dividing by 10.

businessContext_i18n.en: Sitting height measured in millimeters. Will be converted to cm by dividing by 10.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Milimetre cinsinden ölçülen oturma yüksekliği. 10'a bölünerek cm'ye dönüştürülecektir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Sitzhöhe in Millimetern gemessen. Wird durch Division durch 10 in cm umgerechnet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur assise mesurée en millimètres. Sera convertie en cm en divisant par 10.

inputs.label: Standing Height (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Standing height measured in centimeters from floor to vertex.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standing height measured in centimeters from floor to vertex.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yerden tepe noktasına santimetre cinsinden ölçülen ayakta boy.
businessContext_i18n.de: Stehhöhe in Zentimetern gemessen vom Boden bis zum Scheitelpunkt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taille debout mesurée en centimètres du sol au sommet de la tête.

inputs.label: Standing Height (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Standing height measured in millimeters. Will be converted to cm by dividing by 10.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standing height measured in millimeters. Will be converted to cm by dividing by 10.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Milimetre cinsinden ölçülen ayakta boy. 10'a bölünerek cm'ye dönüştürülür.
businessContext_i18n.de: Stehende Körpergröße in Millimetern. Wird durch Division durch 10 in cm umgerechnet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taille debout mesurée en millimètres. Sera convertie en cm en divisant par 10.
